query:
WITH prev_running AS (
                SELECT COALESCE(q.running, false) AS running
                FROM debounce_key dk_prev
                LEFT JOIN v2_job_queue q ON q.id = dk_prev.job_id
                WHERE dk_prev.key = $2
            )
            INSERT INTO debounce_key (job_id, key)
            VALUES ($1, $2)
            ON CONFLICT (key)
            DO UPDATE SET
                previous_job_id = CASE WHEN (SELECT running FROM prev_running)
                    THEN NULL ELSE debounce_key.job_id END,
                job_id = EXCLUDED.job_id,
                debounced_times = CASE WHEN (SELECT running FROM prev_running)
                    THEN 0 ELSE debounce_key.debounced_times + 1 END,
                first_started_at = CASE WHEN (SELECT running FROM prev_running)
                    THEN now() ELSE debounce_key.first_started_at END
            RETURNING
                debounced_times,
                first_started_at,
                previous_job_id AS job_id_to_debounce
